StyledText.Data: Fill in information for the navigation menu items in chapter <<TF CH Header::Text>>
Created by: <<CreatedBy>>. • <<CreationTimestamp>> |. Last modified by: <<ModifiedBy>> • <<Container modified>>

Calculation.Text: FAT Modifier @ Page item::Unprettified name = "Block Duration" Or FAT Modifier @ Page item::Unprettified name = "Block Label" Or FAT Modifier @ Page item::Unprettified name = "Block Thumbnail" Or FAT Modifier @ Page item::Unprettified name = "Block Navigation Menu Visibility" Or FAT Modifier @ Page item::Unprettified name = "Timer duration"
FAT Modifier @ Page item::Unprettified name ≠ "Block navigation menu visibility"

TableOccurrenceReference.name: FAT Block @ Page item AV PI

Calculation.Text: FAT Modifier @ Page item::Unprettified name ≠ "Block label"
True Or FAT Modifier @ Page item::Unprettified name ≠ "Block duration"
"Enter duration for the page item in seconds (i.e 5*60)"
FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type = "Media" Or FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type = "Text" Or FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type = "Value list radio"
FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type ≠ "Value list radio"

StyledText.Data: Width: <<Media MV PI::Container width>> Height: <<Media MV PI::Container height>> Size: <<Media MV PI::Container file size readable>> Expected dimensions: 300x169 px

Calculation.Text: FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type = "Media" Or FAT Modifier @ Page item::Type = "Text"
Media MV PI::Container width < 320 And Media MV PI::Container height < 180
